prompt: A dynamic anime-style illustration of a sharply dressed young man in a dramatic foreshortened action pose, viewed from above as if he is lunging upward toward the camera while drawing a rapier straight at the viewer. He has golden blond hair, neatly styled with a center part and soft swept-back volume, and fair skin. His face is mostly hidden by the camera angle and shadow, creating a mysterious, stylish look. He wears a tailored dark navy business suit with a subtle sheen, a light blue dress shirt, a vivid blue necktie, and polished black dress shoes. One hand dominates the foreground in extreme perspective, gripping the ornate rapier hilt; the other hand pulls the blade free, emphasizing motion and tension. The sword has 1 slender silver blade, 1 elaborate metallic guard with interlocking loops, and 1 engraved pommel. The composition is bold and graphic, with the character diagonally crossing the frame over 1 large inverted triangle backdrop filled with pale aqua and turquoise geometric fan-like patterns, outlined with a thin warm beige border, set against a clean light gray background. High-detail digital painting, glossy anime illustration, elegant action character art, crisp linework, rich fabric folds, dramatic perspective distortion, fashion-magazine polish, cool blue palette, white negative space, centered vertical composition.
